name: contam-tools
description: Codex plugin for running and inspecting CONTAM projects through a local CONTAM MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Packages a local CONTAM MCP launcher, project guard script, and workflow skill for installation/API discovery, project inspection, diagnostics, case hygiene, scenario cloning, case matrices, ContamW SketchPad layout generation, GUI-safe result settings, contamxpy co-simulation, simulation, text-result triage, and bridge sessions.
defaultPrompt: Make this PRJ safe for ContamW Building Check and result review.
